tools.name: submit_rfq
tools.description: Lodge a request-for-quotation with GreenCore Solutions Corp. A human reviews and answers every ticket — no order is decided by this tool. Returns a ticket ID for polling via check_rfq_status. Optionally reference a GTIN resolved on mcp.cpgknowledgegraph.ai and an SM-ECO-10060 market code.

tools.name: check_rfq_status
tools.description: Poll a ticket previously lodged on this MCP (RFQ, terms request, or escalation). Returns current status and, once a human has answered, the answer.

tools.name: request_terms
tools.description: Ask a commercial or procedural question — terms, conditions, eligibility context, process. The question is lodged as a ticket and a human answers it. Returns a ticket ID for polling via check_rfq_status.

tools.name: escalate
tools.description: Hand a matter that cannot be resolved deterministically to GSC Navigator human review. Emits ACM-451 ESCALATE. Returns a ticket ID for polling via check_rfq_status.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: check_rfq_status · Public sink: submit_rfq.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: check_rfq_status · Public sink: submit_rfq

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
